pluses: Eyes bred for the black — Night Vision, always
Made for slaughter — a crueler, stronger blow (+25%)
Bloodlust — a fresh kill knits an Orc's wounds (heal on kill)
Soldier's hide — hardened for war (9 hearts)
Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
minuses: Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for less (−30%) and is slowed (Slowness I)
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
